comments: this is a great apartment in a great location with great hosts. i stayed here for three months for work and would definitely stay again.

It was a perfect location and great price for us. We were there for a wedding so spend very little time in the place. However, it was simple, but ideal for us. The room and bed were large, and we had access to a shared kitchen and bathroom. The room was a bit too cold for us and a shared small bathroom isn't the best but it was still comfortable enough. The host is also really kind. Would stay over again!
Great place and location!

Baydaa was responsive and welcoming. She greeted us at the door and gave us a quick tour. We came during the late fall so it was a bit chilly in the room- however, Baydaa prepped the room well with extra blankets, which was nice.

I would highly recommend Reut’s beautiful AirBnB and wouldn’t hesitate to stay again! Reut was super friendly and helpful our entire stay. The place was spotless and so well set up, with a super comfy bed, and is located in a vibrant and friendly neighborhood. We loved it!
Very nice staff amazing location and very clean. I loved my stay.
We came for the Sabrina Carpenter Halloween concert and we had the best time. The room was great. The Staff when we checked in was amazing. Overall was an amazing experience.

We called to request a late check-out in the morning about 45 min before scheduled check-out. They charged $25 extra per hour, which was fine, and they processed it. However, their staff harassed us every 10-15 min throughout the extra 2 hours we paid for, knocking on our door and once even opening it to talk to (yell at) us INSIDE the room. It was incessant, and I have never had any hotel staff treat us this way before. This is the main reason for the poor review.
The room was also dusty, and the phone and AC unit were both broken and did not work/turn on. The room was extremely cold due to the way the AC was installed, leaving whole gaps in the window (no screen).

This was by far one of the best stays I’ve had! Tammie was so responsive from the time I booked to the time I checked out. We even had a great conversation during one of my days there. I was thoroughly impressed with how spotless the entire property was, the convenient location, and the quiet environment. Whenever I make my way back to New York again, Tammie’s listing will be the first place I look to!
Very nice apartment, good location. Easy to communicate with Mo.
Świetny pobyt, okolica spokojna, blisko do metra. Misbau był bardzo miłym i troskliwym gospodarzem, a miejsce jest nowe i przyjemne. :) dziękujemy za fajny czas!

Julio is very nice and went above and beyond to be accommodating. The room is spacious and having a mini fridge and a coffee machine in the room goes a long way for guests. I very much appreciated those amenities. The apartment itself is spacious and it’s in a great area. Highly recommend!
nous avons passé un excellent séjour on vous recommande l appart metro a 10mn et magasin a côté

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour.
La literie est très bonne et la cuisine assez fonctionnelle.
Petite précision pour les distances: entre 12 et 15 min à pied d’un métro, à 2min d’un arrêt de bus. Temps de trajet: 35min pour le Sud de Manhattan et 45 min pour Central Park. C’est bon à savoir car c’est compliqué de faire une pause au logement dans la journée et de revenir sur Manhattan ensuite, à moins de passer beaucoup de temps dans les transports.
Mais ce logement reste un très bon rapport qualité prix.
Chad a été très réactif et arrangeant, échanges très agréables.
Great all around.

This was a quiet and cozy place with a lot of Brooklyn charm. The restaurant’s nearby were great and it really felt like we were living in Brooklyn. The train station was easily walkable which gave us access to NYC for day trips. The hosts were very responsive and helpful during the entire stay. I highly recommend this property!
The pictures really don’t do this place justice, the house is beautiful and the host responds very quickly! Would definitely stay again

My first couple of nights in New York I stayed with Barbara and I couldn’t be happier with my choice.
Barbara is so incredibly warm, friendly and welcomely that you really don’t feel like a guest in her home. And she has a great respect for your personal space.
It is easy to tell that Barbara has given love and style to her beautiful space. It also has easy access to the train and great restaurants and bars.
100% would recommend.
Thanks Barbara ☺️

Extremely kind and responsive hosts - we felt right at home. The plants make this apartment feel serene & grounded. Also this location is perfect, a sweet and secluded street in a super fun part of bushwick. Thank you for having us 🌱
one of the best experiences I've had with airbnb!! I will definitely be staying here again the next time I'm in NYC! :)
The host was super accommodating and super responsive! Loved staying there and had a great time visiting the city!!
Mehmet was very helpful. He coordinated really well. The place is really good, walkable to a lot of great restaurants and other places to see around Manhattan
no problems.
Wonderful responsive host! Exactly as pictured and described in a very convenient location. Thank you!!

Our stay was what was expected after comparing all of these Air BnB reviews to the ones on Google (which drastically defer from those here). I’m very glad we booked with Air BnB as everything was smooth! Hosts are great.
Staying in Harlem was wonderful and there are many great hidden gems, along with wonderful coffee spots & easy subway access down either way on 125th.
Front desk was accommodating. We were bummed our booked King was changed to a double Queen without notice, but didn’t reach out to our host since we enjoyed the view of the Queen room (wonderful view of Central Park)! Kalim was awesome!
However, please note the Victoria Restaurant is a separate entity from the hotel itself so I will not include my grievances in the overall star rating. This is truly the only piece I had qualms about. The hostess was awesome & the bartenders were great. Our dining experience was not great. That’s a separate review for the restaurant itself! :)
Had a wonderful time overall!

This is a great little appartment with everything you need. The neighbourhood has lots of restaurants and cafes. The subway is 10 minutes walk away and the wonderful Prospect Park is 15 minutes away. Angel is a very kind host.
My mom and I really enjoyed our stay! It was very clean, nearby the bus, and LaGuardia. I really appreciated the clear information he provided as a guest. I’d definitely stay again :)
decent location, bit pricey for what you get.

Super clean, great view. The room is small but they make excellent use of the space. Everything is very modern. Check-in was easy and everything is as advertised. Would definitely stay again. Solid price for a last-minute Halloween hotel.

Je reviendrais certainement chez Cathy pour un prochain séjour à NYC .
Le logement est très agréable , très propre et le lit très confortable
Excellent emplacement à Brooklyn proche du métro et de Manhattan mais aussi des quais sur East River ( vue magnifique de jour et de nuit ) le ferry est à 10 mn à pied
Le quartier de Williamsburg south est très animé , beaucoup de commerces , bars restaurants
Bref un excellent séjour
Merci Cathy !
위치가 너무 좋아서 이동이나 식사, 쇼핑. 여행이 쉬웠습니다. 다만 침대의 철제프레임에서 조금만 움직여도 삐그덕 소리가 나서 고치면 좋을 것 같습니다

I stayed here for a concert at MSG and it was the perfect location to the venue. The hosts were super responsive and helpful with all of my questions and the check in and check out process was super easy and smooth.
the bathroom shower and free breakfeast were great. good location for the price. never felt unsafe walking around at night.
Close to subway, not as noisy as was described in comments, chosen due to location

Loved staying at the Public NYC, would definitely stay there again in a future trip do New York! The room is beautiful and comfortable, the hotel staff is very friendly, the location is amazing, and the common areas of the hotel are very pleasant!

Thank you to Marcia who made our trip to NY absolutely wonderful. She was always warm and hospitable and full of suggestions for places to eat and visit. The place is in a great location within walking and subway distance of plenty to see and do. Everything was clean and tidy and we loved our stay (including lovely Minnie Bleu). Looking forward to visiting again in the future!

Benjamin & Don were amazing hosts! They are both very proactive, friendly, & responsive. We stayed for a month & felt very much at home. The beds were comfortable and the linens provided felt high quality. The place has lots of charm, gets good sunlight in the mornings, & was quieter than we expected. Benjamin & Don made sure they were available as needed but were very considerate about giving privacy & space. We were in a transitional period of our lives of moving & the way Benjamin & Don welcomed us really helped us feel comfortable and stable. Benjamin & Don were honestly one of the best (if not, the best) hosts we've stayed with & we hope to be back if we ever need another long term stay in NYC.

Our stay at Christian’s was great! The space was very nice and private. It was close to many places to eat & grab a quick snack. Christian was very responsive at all times & gave recommendations to places in the area. He was also very accommodating. 5/5!!
Outstanding Service!
Terrific hosts! Terrific place. Will absolutely stay again in the future. Very clean and wonderful. 10/10

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Gregorian Hotel, and I can confidently say it was a good experience
From the moment I arrived, the staff greeted me with warm smiles and exceptional hospitality. The check-in process was smooth and efficient, setting a positive tone for my entire stay. The lobby was beautifully decorated, exuding an inviting atmosphere.
The hotel location is another major plus !!!!!

Ms. Mandi was very personable. She was knowledgeable about the area and connecting communities. She gave tips about using the subway system as well as pointing out pertinent information about the neighborhood. She thought about the details and was very accommodating. I really appreciate her hospitality.
Awesome host. Very communicative and insightful!

Was a terrible experience, I was supposed to check in at 4pm, so we arrived to the hotel 8pm and we weren’t able to check in until 11:30pm because the manager said there was a Broken pipe in all of the available rooms, so he just didn’t help at all, not apologetic at all he just said to come back at 11pm- just overall bad customer service. Also the complimentary breakfast was so simple, I can buy a better breakfast at the 7eleven, and the room smelled so bad, horrible experience, don’t recommend at all.
The Airbnb was perfect for our night in the city. Our group was comfortable and was able to walk to everything we needed!
Good place to stay in Times Square

Love this place!!! Super close to theaters and great restaurants in Restaurant Row. Love amenities especially daily coffee and HH with wine and beer. Staff were friendly, accommodating and kind when dealing with check in mishap. They were proactive and reassuring in helping us.
Host was also great in helping us with check in and coordinating with management. Would DEFINITELY stay here again. One of my favorites for sure!
Laura is just the best. You can get whatever help you need from her, and all the kindest attitude. Thank you so much Laura! We love you❤️
Great spot in a quiet neighborhood with nice neighbors, easy to get into the city on the LIRR. Has everything you need.
Great! Thanks for all!

Logement type auberge de jeunesse, calme et très propre. Nous avons eu quelques soucis avec le chauffage, il faisait très chaud dans la chambre, mais les personnes sur place ont fait leur possible pour nous aider.
Nous avons particulièrement aimé le fait que l’alimentation soit au minimum végétarienne, voire vegan pour une partie. En tant que couple vegan, nous soutenons ce genre d’initiatives.

We spent five months at Tevis’s apartment and it felt like home! Would highly recommend for a long term stay. The apartment is cozy & spacious with luxurious furnishings. The street is quiet and central to the best of Williamsburg. Thanks for being such a responsive and hospitable host!

We had a great time staying at Tanya's place. It is just like the pictures show. Tanya was helpful with fast and informative communication, and also provided an extra bed for our infant. The location is good with easy connection by bus. It is a peaceful and quiet neighborhood, we felt safe there (unlike Jamaica central at times). Overall we had a great stay!

My stay at Milagros’s was pretty chill! Although I thought it’d be bigger than expected, the room was still pretty cute & worthwhile! Everything went good. Milagros was really nice & super responsive which I feel is very ideal & I LOVED that:)! Faults for me was not being told I’d be with only men as roommates- that threw me off so bad especially since I can get highly uncomfortable around any men at times even worse if I don’t know them… luckily they were to themselves & I made sure to be as well. Also felt it’s a bit too far from everything so that was also a pain especially if you’re always out & about:,). Otherwise overall stay rating, fair.
Great location, worth the price
Very nice place with a very nice host :)
I had to postpone my trip but Anna was in constant contact, friendly and welcoming.

I’ve never booked a hotel stay through Airbnb before, but this was such a great experience! We chose the Hilton because it’s so close to Barclays Center-just an easy 20-minute walk for the concert we were seeing.
The staff were amazing, and the hotel itself was beautiful. We were extremely happy with our stay and would definitely stay here again!
Great location for a stay in Brooklyn. The host was also super fast in responding to any requests/questions I had. 100% recommend!

Het appartement ligt mooi centraal. De vrouw die ons ontving was heel vriendelijk. Zeker een aanrader , het is niet heel groot, maar wij waren toch de hele dag op pad .
Goede douche!

Everything was great the only problem is related to the building not the unit by itself. the building switched the AC in Heating move and even with the 2 heaters off the apt was very hot due to the rest of the buiding. That would be my only complain but overall it's a great place to stay would recommend it to my friends and family.

We loved Johnny’s beautifully appointed and spacious apartment. Our room was quiet, we loved having a ceiling fan and a comfortable bed. Enjoyable morning coffee and chats, excellent tips for first timers in NY, wonderful local knowledge and friendly, generous hospitality. Easy access to Times Square, restaurants and transport. Would love to stay again!
Johnny is hospitable and discrete.
The place is really clean and nice. We really enjoyed our stay. The host is really cool, friendly and helpful.
Pequeño estudio con todo lo necesario para una estancia cómoda, en zona tranquila de Manhattan.
Mondell is a very nice and welcoming host, he accommodated us because we had to check in very late, and was flexible with check out time! We had a nice stay.

Spettacolare la vista dalla stanza. Posto accogliente pulito e grande per gli standard di nyc. La metro sta davanti all’hotel basta entrare nell’oculus. Personale gentilissimo. Se dovessi tornare a NYC sarà la mia scelta
logement très bien situé, métro à 5 min à pied qui dessert beaucoup d arrêt. Pas loin de tout les points de vue important (20min central Park, 20 min times square..)
Thank you so much for the great location and quiet neighborhood.

A great deal close to everything we needed during our trip. Simple and clean, amenities available. There are 2 flights of stairs to keep in mind for the unit we stayed in, so not practical for some. But overall a great choice!
Genuinely such an unbelievably kind host. The rooms were exactly as described and she even had some treats out for guests! I most definitely recommend and would stay here again :)
Anthony was a great host! Would definitely recommend him to anyone looking for a great place to stay. Yankee stadium wasn’t too far away to catch a train if you need. Great location.

We were a family of 5 staying in the apartment and we all loved it. I chose it so that everyone could have their own space for relaxation after busy days. The bedrooms were all very comfy and uniquely decorated. We all loved all of the attention to detail, so much to look at and enjoy.
The apartment has everything you could possibly want for, I have never been to a better equipped air bnb, Heather has thought of everything.
Heather was so flexible, friendly and communicative, with great local recommendations and letting us store our luggage etc.
Location is great, so much on your doorstep and less than 2 minutes from the subway.
I would 100% recommend this stay.
excelente!

I had a wonderful week in New York and at Carla’s apartment. The apartment is exactly as shown in the photos: very clean, cozy, and lovingly decorated. The room was perfect for me, and the bed was incredibly comfortable, I slept wonderfully. I really felt at home at Carla’s.
The location is ideal: within walking distance to the nearest subway station and Times Square.
Carla is a very warm and kind person, and it was lovely to meet her. I would highly recommend her place to anyone and would gladly stay again!☺️
Izi was a great house. Place is perfectly located
Our stayed was amazing

In der Unterkunft von Jeffrey fühlt man sich sofort wie zu Hause. Man erreicht den Teil des Hauses über eine schmale Treppe. Von dort gibt es drei Türen: zu einem Schlafzimmer mit ausreichend Möglichkeit Sachen unterzustellen und zu einem größeren Schlafzimmer mit Abstellmöglichkeiten, einem kleinen Kühlschrank, Wasserkocher und Kaffeemaschine. Ein kleines Frühstück ist also durchaus möglich. Die dritte Tür führt zu einem sehr schönen Bad. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man benötigt. Die Umgebung ist eine bunte und freundliche Nachbarschaft, die man sich gut erlaufen kann. Jeffrey ist ein hilfsbereiter Gastgeber. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und kommen bestimmt wieder.

Wonderful is an understatement when describing Yvonne as a host. She was so kind, accommodating, and very helpful with local transportation location to buses and trains. Not only was her home extremely clean but it was also peaceful and cozy. The upper deck felt like a little studio and I highly recommend Yvonne’s place to rent during your NYC travels. Thank you for an amazing stay!

Shannon est une hote adorable, très accueillante. La maison est très idéalement positionnée, sûre pour une femme seule.
Je recommande 🤗
Alles top!

I had a good and easy stay. They were good with communication and I had a few problems along the way and they communicated very well and fix them immediately. Would recommend to anyone looking for a quiet place in New York.
Spent three months there, had a great time. Dusan is very responsive and helpful and the apartment is big, clean, and comfortable.
Bon séjour
Great location, clean room, friendly staff.

Gran anfitrión, estaba siempre disponible a través del teléfono. La habitación es espaciosa y con una mesa de trabajo. Se podía utilizar la cocina y el salón. La localización era muy buena, al lado del central park y prácticamente a 15 minutos de midtwon andando.
Super close to the subway station; very clean and easy to check in!
Perfect place, super clean everything works.

JP and Andrew were such amazing hosts. From day one, they were so kind and supportive and were always checking in from time to time to make sure my transition to New York was nice and smooth. The room was exactly how it was described and pictured. The location was close to public transit and so many cute cafes and shops nearby. Not to mention, PIZZA right next door! They made me feel right at home and I am so grateful to have met such nice kind people! I highly recommend staying with JP and Andrew if you’re looking for a spot in New York!

Great stay at Ike's. He was very responsive both before our trip and during it. The flat was spacious and as described - clean and comfortable, if a bit tired. Yes, there's a lot of street noise, including late at night so if that bothers you look elsewhere or bring good earplugs. Lower East Side was a great location for us, transit was easy by bus and subway.

This location was great, it was a short walk to the subway. This is perfect for a solo traveler or someone who will be out and about most of the day. She was a great host and let me drop off my luggage before check In. She sent out a list of recommendations for dining , grocery etc and is very easy to get along with. Her dog was sooo adorable too! Perfect short term stay !!
Very nice place!!
Se encuentra en una excelente ubicación y el trato del personal es muy amigable además de serviciales

Absolutely loved our stay. It’s a 5 minute walk to the nearest station & we felt very safe. Our host Jay was incredible and super friendly. He was able to accommodate us with an early check in and allowed us to drop off our luggage earlier. His place was super clean, extremely comfortable, and had everything and more that we could have needed. I mean seriously, he thinks of everything. Something that really stood out to us was how comfortable the bed was! Like truly so great. We will definitely be staying here again on our next trip to NYC.
Great place

The neighborhood is beautiful and was very well decorated for Halloween, and the neighbors were really friendly. It’s close to the subway and well located, with nice small independent shops nearby. It looks just like what you’d imagine when thinking of Brooklyn - just like in the movies.
The apartment is comfortable, clean, and well equipped. However, it’s quite dark, and the lower level where our kids slept felt a bit gloomy.
John was super responsive, answering every single message within a minute. However, since they live in the house just upstairs, we would have appreciated a quick hello in person.
We would recommend this place if you’re looking for a quieter spot to stay (compared to Manhattan) and if you plan to spend most of your time out exploring the city - which is usually the case when visiting New York ;-)
Perfect location. Quiet nice building with lovely roof top view. Light, airy, modern.
cute little room worth the price for what it is & the location
Had a lovely stay, the crashpad looks just like the pics. Everything was clean and there were no issues.
Was a great stay!
Stayed there for a couple of extra nights in NYC. Easy to get in, close to the subway, private bathroom was good. Good spot for an affordable last minute booking. Would stay again!
